name: ThinkCapital
description_short: ThinkCapital is a prop firm backed by regulated broker ThinkMarkets, offering 1-, 2-, and 3-step challenges across 4,000+ instruments with up to 90% profit splits.
description_long:
ThinkCapital is a proprietary trading firm launched in July 2024, built on the infrastructure of ThinkMarkets — a globally regulated broker with over a decade of experience and regulatory oversight from the FCA (UK), ASIC (Australia), and CySEC (Cyprus). This institutional backing gives ThinkCapital a level of credibility and financial stability that is rare among prop firms, which are often standalone startups with limited operating histories.

Traders can choose from three challenge structures: the Nexus (3-step) for a more accessible entry with progressive profit targets of 7%, 6%, and 5%; the Lightning (1-step) for traders seeking rapid funding with a single 10% target; and the Dual Step (2-step) as a middle-ground at 8% then 5%. All accounts carry a static 8% maximum drawdown (Lightning uses 6% trailing) and a 4% daily drawdown, with a minimum of 3 trading days per phase and leverage up to 1:100. Challenge fees start at $39 for a $5K Nexus account, with frequent promo codes cutting 25–40% off listed prices.

The trading environment spans over 4,000 instruments including 50+ forex pairs, major indices (US30, NAS100, GER40), commodities (gold, silver, WTI/Brent oil), crypto (BTC and ETH at 1:2 leverage), and ETFs. Markets are accessed through MetaTrader 5, the proprietary ThinkTrader platform on desktop, web, and mobile, or TradingView with direct chart-trading integration. Expert Advisors are permitted as a paid add-on. ThinkTrader includes standout tools like a TrendRisk Scanner and Traders' Gym — a historical simulation environment for strategy practice.

Payout splits default to 80% to the trader, upgradable to 90% via a fee add-on of approximately 25% on the challenge price. Payouts are bi-weekly by default, with weekly payouts unlockable over time and a scaling path up to $1.5 million in allocated capital. Challenge fees are refunded upon successful completion. The affiliate program offers tiered commissions ranging from 10% at the Starter level to 25% for Master-tier partners (300+ referrals), paid via crypto or bank transfer.
pros: Backed by ThinkMarkets, a multi-regulated broker (FCA, ASIC, CySEC) with 10+ years of operating history
Three challenge formats (1-step, 2-step, 3-step) accommodate different trading styles and risk tolerances
4,000+ tradeable instruments spanning forex, indices, commodities, crypto, and ETFs
TradingView integration and MT5 support alongside the proprietary ThinkTrader platform
Scaling path up to $1.5M allocated capital with frequent 25–40% promotional discounts
cons: Founded July 2024 — very limited long-term payout track record to evaluate
90% profit split requires a paid add-on costing approximately 25% more than the base challenge fee
Lightning plan's 6% trailing drawdown is tighter than most competitors and can catch active traders
No futures or exchange-traded options — all instruments are CFD-based only
